tools.name: analyze_environment
tools.description: Analyze global and project-level MCP configurations, detect conflicts and provide recommendations

tools.name: fetch_mcps
tools.description: Fetch the latest available MCPs from the official registry. Takes 30 seconds on first run, then cached for 30 minutes.

force.description: Force refresh even if cached data is available

tools.name: list_mcps
tools.description: List all MCPs with their status (enabled/disabled)

tools.name: enable_mcp
tools.description: Enable an MCP for the current project

mcpId.description: The ID of the MCP to enable (e.g., 'supabase', 'github')

envVars.description: Environment variables required by the MCP

tools.name: disable_mcp
tools.description: Disable an MCP for the current project

mcpId.description: The ID of the MCP to disable

tools.name: auto_detect
tools.description: Auto-detect MCPs that would be useful for the current project based on files and configuration

tools.name: search_mcps
tools.description: Search for MCPs based on keywords or requirements

tools.name: suggest_mcps
tools.description: Get intelligent MCP suggestions based on project requirements

requirements.description: Description of what you need (e.g., 'I need to work with databases and APIs')

tools.name: diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose issues with the current MCP setup

tools.name: get_mcp_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific MCP

mcpId.description: The ID of the MCP to get information about

examples.user: What MCPs do I have configured?
examples.assistant: I'll analyze your MCP environment to see what you have configured.

examples.user: I need to work with databases
examples.assistant: Let me search for database-related MCPs and suggest the best options for you.
I'll enable the Supabase MCP for your project.

examples.user: What MCPs should I use for this project?
examples.assistant: Let me auto-detect what MCPs would be useful based on your project structure.
I'll fetch the latest MCP registry to show you all available options.
